name: minimal-itx-v2
description: A smaller ITX reference: stateless Cap'n Web capability tree plus a tiny stream-backed dynamic capability processor.

scripts.typecheck: pnpm types:wrangler && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.node.json && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.wrangler-proof.json
scripts.types:wrangler:proof: wrangler types types-and-schemas.wrangler-proof.d.ts --config wrangler.types-and-schemas-proof.jsonc --env-interface TypesAndSchemasProofEnv --include-runtime false
